founder.name: Sis. Rosammal
founder.bio_intro: El Shaddai Worship Center began in 1985 with a small gathering of believers meeting in a modest room in Nagercoil, under the leadership of our Founding Apostle. What started as a handful of families praying together grew, year after year, into a congregation spanning generations — built not on numbers, but on an unshakeable conviction that the Word of God is unchanging.
founder.bio_legacy: The founding hand behind El Shaddai Worship Center, his unwavering faith and apostolic calling laid the foundation this church still stands on today. His ministry shaped generations of believers in Nagercoil and left a legacy of conviction that continues to guide this house of faith long after his passing.
founder.quote: Build the house on truth, and the gates of hell will not prevail against it.
founder.home_blurb: The founding hand behind El Shaddai Worship Center, whose apostolic calling laid the foundation this church still stands on.

head_pastor.name: Senior Head Pastor
head_pastor.bio_intro: Leading the congregation today with a heart for discipleship and a vision to see every member walk in their God-given calling. Under his leadership, El Shaddai continues to grow as a family rooted in prayer, the Word, and genuine community.
head_pastor.bio_family: He serves alongside his wife and family, who share in the work of ministry and are a familiar, loving presence to the congregation — a reminder that shepherding this house has always been a family calling, not a solitary one.
head_pastor.home_blurb: Leading the congregation today with a heart for discipleship and a vision for every member to walk in their calling.
